name: Airtable
description: Airtable is a spreadsheet-database hybrid for flexible relational databases. The API provides full CRUD for bases, tables, fields, records, views, comments, webhooks, and collaborators with rich field type support.

capabilities.name: bases_list
capabilities.description: List all bases accessible to the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: bases_get
capabilities.description: Get schema of a base including all tables and fields.

capabilities.name: tables_create
capabilities.description: Create a new table in a base.

capabilities.name: tables_update
capabilities.description: Update a table's name or description.

capabilities.name: fields_list
capabilities.description: List fields in a table.

capabilities.name: fields_create
capabilities.description: Create a new field in a table.

capabilities.name: fields_update
capabilities.description: Update a field's name, description, or configuration.

capabilities.name: views_list
capabilities.description: List views in a table.

capabilities.name: records_list
capabilities.description: List records in a table with optional filtering and sorting.

capabilities.name: records_get
capabilities.description: Get a single record by ID.

capabilities.name: records_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more new records.

capabilities.name: records_update
capabilities.description: Update one or more existing records (partial update).

capabilities.name: records_replace
capabilities.description: Replace one or more records (full replacement).

capabilities.name: records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more records by ID.

capabilities.name: comments_list
capabilities.description: List comments on a record.

capabilities.name: comments_create
capabilities.description: Add a comment to a record.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List webhooks for a base.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for a base.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_payloads_list
capabilities.description: List webhook payloads.

capabilities.name: webhooks_refresh
capabilities.description: Refresh a webhook to extend its expiration.

capabilities.name: collaborators_list
capabilities.description: List collaborators on a base.

capabilities.name: collaborators_add
capabilities.description: Add a collaborator to a base.

capabilities.name: collaborators_update
capabilities.description: Update a collaborator's permissions.
